content: crossterm panic pitfall: if code panics after enable_raw_mode(), the terminal stays in raw mode permanently, corrupting the shell. The fix is a TerminalGuard RAII struct implementing Drop (claudebar already does this correctly). macOS-specific: termios state stored in Mutex<Option<Termios>> - restored on drop. If using std::panic::set_hook the hook runs before Drop, so the terminal may still be broken when the panic message prints. Solution: set_hook to disable_raw_mode before printing the panic.
